content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 25.7%) with full participation (Breadth: 8/8 sectors positive), confirming broad risk appetite.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom ABOVE TREND: KONTR (1W: +26.86% | 1M: +12.54%) and TCELL (1W: +10.87% | 1M: +6.89%) are driving the sector; Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: TKFEN (1W: +26.71% | 1M: +41.76%) and ENKAI (1W: +14.82% | 1M: +14.27%) are strong.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals, Transportation and Retail are the relative laggards but still positive; Energy & Chemicals (e.g. TUPRS (1W: +2.88% | 1M: +5.68%) ABOVE TREND) shows the softest weekly advance.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +26.86% | 1M: +12.54%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +26.71% | 1M: +41.76%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +20.39% | 1M: +27.77%) ABOVE TREND, TOASO (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +2.59%) ABOVE TREND, ENKAI (1W: +14.82% | 1M: +14.27%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TSKB (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +5.07%) ABOVE TREND, PGSUS (1W: +6.91% | 1M: +5.53%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +5.86% | 1M: +20.00%) ABOVE TREND, TAVHL (1W: +5.60% | 1M: +11.29%) ABOVE TREND, ULKER (1W: +4.70% | 1M: +10.37%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +26.86% | 1M: +12.54%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +26.71% | 1M: +41.76%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +20.39% | 1M: +27.77%) ABOVE TREND are the standout momentum plays this week.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks are leading the market: AKBNK (1W: +13.29% | 1M: +11.60%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +10.15% | 1M: +9.68%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +11.07% | 1M: +7.83%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +9.73% | 1M: +8.28%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: +11.99% | 1M: -4.19%) RECOVERY and TSKB (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +5.07%) ABOVE TREND—momentum broad but watch valuation/earnings delivery.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industrials and auto parts are strong: EREGL (1W: +9.08% | 1M: +10.77%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +5.86% | 1M: +20.00%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +9.72% | 1M: +0.04%) ABOVE TREND, TOASO (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +2.59%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +20.39% | 1M: +27.77%) ABOVE TREND lead the pack.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy & chemicals are lagging relative but positive: TUPRS (1W: +2.88% | 1M: +5.68%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +0.64% | 1M: +9.53%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +11.93% | 1M: +10.57%) ABOVE TREND and SISE (1W: +9.77% | 1M: +15.63%) ABOVE TREND—watch input-cost dynamics and FX pass-through.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight cyclicals and selected momentum names in Technology, Construction and Heavy Industry; maintain overweight banks for earnings leverage and trim defensives where performance lags; keep size discipline on names with sharp recent rallies.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +26.86% | 1M: +12.54%) ABOVE TREND for continuation/mean-reversion risk, TKFEN (1W: +26.71% | 1M: +41.76%) ABOVE TREND for re-rating follow-through, AKBNK (1W: +13.29% | 1M: +11.60%) ABOVE TREND for sector leadership, ASELS (1W: +20.39% | 1M: +27.77%) ABOVE TREND for momentum into orders/news.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Technology & Telecom for momentum confirmation, Construction & REIT for earnings and project-flow reactions, Banking & Finance for earnings and credit sensitivity.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to global risk sentiment and USD/TRY moves, CBRT commentary, upcoming corporate earnings and major macro prints; tactical triggers are break/hold of recent breakout levels and flows into high-quant names (watch volumes and profit-taking on big weekly movers).

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON tape with Vol 25.7% and perfect breadth (8/8); cyclicals and banks lead while energy lags. Tactical overweight on momentum names in Technology, Construction and Banks, but trim into strong rallies and watch macro/FX triggers.
